name: @cernion/openclaw-energy-tools-sidecar
description: Dedicated OpenClaw sidecar for Cernion Energy Tools.

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && env -u OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND -u OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_VERSION openclaw --profile cernion-sidecar-build plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && env -u OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND -u OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_VERSION openclaw --profile cernion-sidecar-build plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
